note: EC|loop: redline-3 ×3 qualityGate rounds→loopDetected, recoveryProtocol required

note: EC|L1: 2 failures same strategy→switch to substantively different strategy, explain why prev failed
EC|L2: 3 failures→web_search/source_lookup+exclusions, forbid continue without new info
EC|L4: 5 failures→sync user+minimum viable output+已尝试策略+已知排除项+方向指引
EC|L1→L4: skip blocked→L1 must complete before L2, cannot jump levels
EC|trigger: '我无法解决这个问题'→give_up signal, enter RecoveryProtocol even if failures<2
